nws_forecast.name: Today
nws_forecast.detailed: Rain. Cloudy, with a high near 44. South wind 7 to 13 mph, with gusts as high as 26 mph. Chance of precipitation is 100%. New rainfall amounts between a quarter and half of an inch possible.

nws_forecast.name: Tonight
nws_forecast.detailed: Rain before 1am, then sleet likely and rain likely. Cloudy, with a low around 33. Northwest wind 5 to 15 mph, with gusts as high as 25 mph. Chance of precipitation is 90%. New rainfall amounts between a quarter and half of an inch possible.

nws_forecast.name: Monday
nws_forecast.detailed: A chance of sleet and a chance of rain before 7am, then a chance of sleet and a chance of rain and snow between 7am and 2pm, then scattered snow showers. Cloudy, with a high near 35. North wind 9 to 16 mph, with gusts as high as 26 mph. Chance of precipitation is 40%. New snow accumulation of around one inch possible.

nws_forecast.name: Monday Night
nws_forecast.short_forecast: Scattered Snow Showers then Mostly Cloudy
nws_forecast.detailed: Scattered snow showers before 9pm, then a slight chance of snow between 9pm and 11pm. Mostly cloudy, with a low around 29. North wind around 9 mph. Chance of precipitation is 50%. New snow accumulation of less than one inch possible.

nws_forecast.name: Tuesday
nws_forecast.detailed: Mostly sunny, with a high near 43. Southwest wind around 8 mph.

nws_forecast.name: Tuesday Night
nws_forecast.detailed: Mostly cloudy, with a low around 33. Southwest wind around 10 mph.

nws_forecast.name: Wednesday
nws_forecast.detailed: Mostly cloudy, with a high near 50. Southwest wind around 12 mph, with gusts as high as 22 mph.

nws_forecast.name: Wednesday Night
nws_forecast.detailed: A chance of rain after 10pm. Mostly cloudy, with a low around 34. Southwest wind around 10 mph. Chance of precipitation is 30%.

nws_forecast.name: Thursday
nws_forecast.short_forecast: Chance Light Rain then Chance Rain And Snow
nws_forecast.detailed: A chance of rain before 5pm, then a chance of rain and snow. Partly sunny, with a high near 51. South wind 8 to 12 mph. Chance of precipitation is 40%.

nws_forecast.name: Thursday Night
nws_forecast.detailed: Rain and snow likely. Mostly cloudy, with a low around 38. Southwest wind around 13 mph, with gusts as high as 24 mph. Chance of precipitation is 60%.

nws_forecast.name: Friday
nws_forecast.detailed: Rain likely before 11am, then a slight chance of rain and snow between 11am and 4pm. Mostly sunny, with a high near 47. Northwest wind around 14 mph, with gusts as high as 24 mph. Chance of precipitation is 60%.

nws_forecast.name: Friday Night
nws_forecast.detailed: Mostly clear, with a low around 23. Northwest wind 9 to 13 mph.

nws_forecast.name: Saturday
nws_forecast.detailed: Sunny, with a high near 39. West wind around 9 mph.

nws_forecast.name: Saturday Night
nws_forecast.detailed: Mostly clear, with a low around 29. Southwest wind around 9 mph.
